title: micranthes pensylvanica var. forbesii
intro: Micranthes pensylvanica var. forbesii, also known as Forbes' wintergreen or low wintergreen, is a plant species within the saxifrage family that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant contains methyl salicylate, a compound similar to aspirin, which gives it medicinal properties in treating pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Micranthes pensylvanica var. forbesii include its ability to reduce fever and relieve headaches, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Forbes' wintergreen typically involve the leaves being infused in hot water to make a tea or used in tinctures and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
